settings.content: We offer standard (5-7 business days) and express (2-3 business days) shipping within the country. All orders over $50 qualify for free standard shipping.
settings.title: What are the shipping options?

settings.content:
<section class="ybc-p">Yes, we ship to over 30 countries worldwide! International delivery times and costs are calculated at checkout based on your location.</section>
<section class="ybc-p">These answers maintain the same helpful, customer-focused tone while providing clear and practical information.</section>
settings.title: Do you offer international shipping?

settings.content: We offer a range of shipping options to meet your needs. Standard shipping (5-7 business days) is free on orders over $50. For faster delivery, we provide expedited shipping (2-3 business days) and express shipping (1 business day) for an additional fee.
settings.title: What are the shipping options?

settings.content: Yes, we ship to a wide range of international destinations. Shipping costs and delivery times vary depending on the location and are calculated automatically at checkout. Please note that customers are responsible for any applicable customs duties or import taxes.
settings.title: Do you offer international shipping?

Sipply Root Beer is a unique blend of classic and innovative flavors. We carefully select natural ingredients and combine traditional brewing techniques with modern tastes to bring you an unprecedented taste experience. This non-alcoholic Root Beer is refreshing and thirst-quenching, boasting a distinctive root botanical aroma and a long-lasting finish. Whether enjoyed alone or shared with friends and family, Sipply Root Beer is your ideal choice for an everyday beverage.

• Serving Size: 1 Can (330ml)

• ABV (Alcohol by Volume): 0.0% (Non-alcoholic)

• Calories per serving: 120 kcal

settings.description:
• Aroma: Rich, sweet notes of natural vanilla and caramel, complemented by subtle herbal hints of anise and wintergreen.
• Palate: Smooth on the tongue with a balanced sweetness and fine carbonation. Vibrant root botanical flavors unfold, including licorice, star anise, and a touch of ginger spice.
• Finish: Clean and lingering, with an earthy freshness and a hint of coolness that leaves a memorable aftertaste.
settings.title: Tasting Notes

settings.description: Filtered Water, Cane Sugar, Natural Flavors (including Vanilla Extract, Licorice Extract, Anise Extract, Wintergreen Extract, Ginger Extract), Caramel Color, Citric Acid, Sodium Bicarbonate, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative).
settings.title: Ingredients
